name: 5p15_33_subtelomeric
description: 5p15.33 subtelomeric region containing TERT and SDHA-paralog SDs. Cri-du-chat syndrome (5p-) involves variable terminal 5p deletions; the flanking SDs (including SDHAP1 / SDHAP3 paralogs) make breakpoint mapping ambiguous and contribute to recurrent SVs in some cancers (TERT promoter region).

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD-rich region with SDHA paralogs (SDHAP1/3), TERT-flanking duplicons, and TRIP13 region; high mutational rate, frequent translocation partner in cancer.
